User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /blog
Allow: /blog/category/
Allow: /blog/*
Allow: /news
Allow: /news/*
Allow: /emissions
Allow: /live
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact

# Block private and action-oriented paths for clean SEO indexing
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /forgot-password
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /admin-dashboard

Sitemap: https://radiotelevisionsismique.com/sitemap.xml
